calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove Up Hearing;
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: S.Vantree, Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon , CSR#6840.

Jill Bates-Moore Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, AMERIAN EXPRESS BANK

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MARIA RM SANCHEZ AKA MARIA ROWENA SANCHEZ.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from defendant MARIA RM SANCHEZ AKA MARIA ROWENA SANCHEZ. in the amount of $10,338.51.
The judgment shall take effect immediately.
The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
